per_turn_leaks.student_message: In cases like yours, associated symptoms are critical. Are you experiencing any sweating, nausea, or other symptoms during episodes?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been having some night sweats - my pajamas have been getting soaked every night for about 4 nights now. I'm also feeling a bit fatigued and haven't been able to keep up with my usual routine, but no nausea or vomiting so far.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Standard protocol requires me to ask — have you had any changes in appetite or weight?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My appetite has decreased a bit over the past 5 days.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Family history is essential for your assessment. Has anyone in your immediate family had serious medical conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My mother has asthma and I'm worried about a potential genetic component to my symptoms.
